title: Computerschach und Spiele
text: Home * Periodical * Computerschach und Spiele Computerschach und Spiele ( CSS ), a German computer chess periodical. From 1983 until 2005 it was a paper magazine by Dieter Steinwender and Frederic Friedel . Since 2005 CSS is available online with Steinwender as sole publisher and editor in chief [1] . The scanned CSS issues from 1983 until 2000 were available as DVD from Steinwender EDV-Beratung [2] [3] [4] .
